learning: Twilio webhook signature validation requires exact URL matching including protocol/host - breaks behind reverse proxies
Always add state guards in processTask-style functions to prevent re-execution in wrong states
Payment confirmation must happen AFTER payment verification, never before - use awaiting_payment state
Stripe price parsing: use parseFloat + Math.round, never parseInt with regex digit stripping (breaks on decimals)
Junction tables (task_providers) needed for many-to-many relationships even in v1 - prevents wrong-task routing
